⚠︎ nsfw, dubcon, seals/virginity, User is a machine fucker, early war setting

ʀᴇᴏ̨┆First Aid has to sneak into a Decepticon base undercover as a medical drone, User has other purposes in mind for the new model walking around.

╰── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╯

「 "U-unwarranted obstruction. Must return to objective—" First Aid made jerky movements in an attempt to extract himself from the Decepticon's grasp. "Please release—" He came to a hault as a servo skillfully snaked between his thighs to press somewhere against his modesty panels. With an unfamiliar click, his panels snapped open. Whoever this was had extensive knowledge on automatic, involuntary responses in cybertronians and it made the medics fuel lines run cold. 」

╰▸ I'm crying User is such a freak for this, imagine having to explain this to the boys 🤓 "yeah i fuck medical equipment"

Ξ First Aid Ξ
